extraction.one_line_summary: DENNIS Rohan won the 9.5km opening time trial by 0.14 seconds over BODNAR Maciej in wet conditions that affected late starters
tactical_patterns: Early starters avoided forecast rain; GC favorites started early sacrificing optimal conditions for guaranteed dry roads over marginal gains
DENNIS Rohan beat BODNAR Maciej by just 0.14 seconds in 9.5km, suggesting minimal power advantage despite rainbow jersey status

rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: third Tour de Suisse career stage win but margin suggests he lacks dominant TT form in rainbow jersey
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: 17 seconds down in 13th shows acceptable GC positioning without revealing time trial ceiling
rider_signals.BODNAR Maciej: positive: second place just 0.14 seconds behind world champion reveals strong early-season TT form
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: seventh place indicates points jersey focus without compromising time trialing effort for later stages
